name: eIDAS
description: eIDAS — national identity (SAML), contributed into auth_acs:provider, sandboxed.

secrets.label: SP Private Key (PEM)
secrets.help: Signs the AuthnRequest; read broker-side, never enters the sandbox.

secrets.label: SP Decryption Key (PEM)
secrets.help: Decrypts EncryptedAssertion (optional; defaults to the signing key).
